message:
fuzz: add three mesh post-verify targets (summary, decode_status, symbol_ack)

Completes the fuzz/Cargo.toml declarations from the preceding commit
by landing the actual libfuzzer harness bodies and their seed corpora
for the three mesh gossip message verify paths:

fuzz_targets/mesh_post_verify_summary.rs:
Arbitrary-generated SummaryInput (digests, counts, IBLT bytes, mode
byte, signing key material) flow through MeshNode::post_verify_summary
with a MemoryObjectStore + MemorySymbolStore backing, exercising:
- GossipSummary deserialization edges (timestamp skew, digest shape,
  IBLT placeholder vs real bytes);
- Admission-class gating against ObjectAdmissionPolicy;
- Quarantine routing when a summary references objects the local
  store has never seen.

fuzz_targets/mesh_post_verify_decode_status.rs:
Exercises the symbol-fan-out side of the gossip protocol: given a
fuzzer-chosen DecodeStatus message, confirms MeshNode cannot be
driven into an internally-inconsistent state (symbol count vs
coverage metadata mismatch, epoch rollover during decode, missing
zone signatures) and never panics on malformed epoch IDs.

fuzz_targets/mesh_post_verify_symbol_ack.rs:
Exercises SymbolAck verification and the subsequent quarantine ledger
update. The target asserts symbol_ack can never grant coverage credit
for symbols the local store has no corresponding ObjectId for.

Seed corpora: small hand-crafted binary inputs covering each
structural decision point (empty bodies, zero-length IBLTs, oversize
symbol lists, valid happy-path shapes). Gives libfuzzer a warm start
rather than requiring it to rediscover the grammar from /dev/null.

Changes authored by other concurrent agents in the working tree;
captured here as a cohesive commit rather than scattered across the
formatting sweep.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false

+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_mesh_post_verify_decode_status"
+path = "fuzz_targets/mesh_post_verify_decode_status.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_mesh_post_verify_symbol_ack"
+path = "fuzz_targets/mesh_post_verify_symbol_ack.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_raptorq_decode_bounds"
 path = "fuzz_targets/raptorq_decode_bounds.rs"
